howItWorks.intro: This compost c:n ratio calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Blend C:N
rules.formula: C:N = (Brown lbs × Brown C:N + Green lbs × Green C:N) / (Brown lbs + Green lbs)

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: What is the ideal C:N ratio?
faq.a: The ideal range is 25:1 to 35:1 for active composting.
Browns are carbon-rich (leaves, cardboard, straw). Greens are nitrogen-rich (food scraps, grass clippings).

howWeCalculate.intro: This compost c:n ratio calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
